emails.subject: RE: 2002 Plan Lay Presentation Run Through
emails.body: RE: 2002 Plan Lay Presentation Run Through Michael Anderson needed an international number so I got it set up for him. Why, does anyone else need it? Let me know.

emails.subject: RE: 2002 Plan Lay Presentation Run Through
emails.body: Yes, Adam Umanoff needs it I believe. Why don't you contact his assistant Lorraine Telles.
